nudge_to_send_now.subject: Re: [original subject — no change]
nudge_to_send_now.body: Claire — happy to walk through anything in the proposal if it helps. Just reply and I'll pick up from there.
nudge_to_send_now.instructions: Two sentences only. Do NOT resend the proposal PDF. Do NOT reference a price. Do NOT discount. Reply-thread to the original email. Send before 09:00 if possible.
nudge_to_send_now.after_this_nudge: If no reply by next Tuesday 2026-04-14: send one final breakup-style close — 'Claire — happy to leave this with you. If the timing changes, you know where I am.' Then close the lead.

if_she_replied_with_yes.action: Lead 3 → CONVERTED. Log £350 (Option B most likely). Write to CHANGELOG.md — first campaign conversion. Check for deposit invoice or agreement. Confirm delivery timeline: 3-4 days from today.

if_she_replied_with_questions.action: Answer clearly and concisely. If she's asking about Fresha: confirm it's free for the salon. If she's asking about timeline: confirm 3-4 working days. Don't over-explain — keep it short and confident.

if_she_replied_with_no.action: Mark lead 3 LOST. Log in CRM. No further contact unless she re-initiates. Acknowledge gracefully: 'Thanks for letting me know, Claire — good luck with the season ahead.'

if_no_reply_at_all.action: Send nudge now (overdue since Thursday). Wait until Tuesday 2026-04-14 before next decision. Do NOT send again this week after the nudge.
if_no_reply_at_all.note: It has been 3 days since the call. This is still recoverable. One clean nudge is all that's needed.

If no reply by Wednesday 2026-04-15: close the loop with a short note and mark as lost for now.
